name: @gitwand/desktop
description: GitWand Desktop — lightweight Git client with smart conflict resolution (Tauri + Vue 3)

scripts.dev:web: concurrently -k -n api,vite -c blue,green "node dev-server.mjs" "node scripts/copy-grammars.mjs && vite"
scripts.bench: cd src-tauri && cargo build --example parity-probe --release && cd .. && node perf/bench.mjs
scripts.bench:check: cd src-tauri && cargo build --example parity-probe --release && cd .. && node perf/bench.mjs --check-against perf/baseline.json
scripts.bench:write-baseline: cd src-tauri && cargo build --example parity-probe --release && cd .. && node perf/bench.mjs --write-baseline perf/baseline.json
